trips.title: Trip management
trips.subtitle: Schedule, track and dispatch all trips for your operator.
trips.searchPlaceholder: Search by trip code, route, plate...
trips.createSubtitle: Schedule trip, assign driver and vehicle.
trips.scheduleManageSubtitle: Create and update trip schedules, assign vehicles, drivers, assistants, fares and recurrence under the current operator scope.
trips.createScheduleSubtitle: Validate route, vehicle, crew and departure time before opening the schedule for operation.
trips.ruleFutureDeparture: Departure time must be in the future.
trips.ruleAvailability: Vehicle and personnel must be available at the selected time.
trips.ruleActiveRoute: Route must be active and belong to the operator.
trips.ruleSubscription: Subscription limits may block opening new schedules.
trips.apiNotice: The schedule-create API is not available yet, so this screen keeps created schedules in local UI state until backend integration is added.
trips.scheduleListSubtitle: Recently created and updated schedules remain visible in this screen.
trips.scheduleSaved: Trip schedule draft has been saved.
trips.scheduleOpened: Trip schedule is ready for operation.
trips.validationRequired: Please fill in route, vehicle, driver, departure time, arrival estimate and fare.
trips.validationRouteInactive: Selected route is inactive or invalid.
trips.validationFutureDeparture: Departure time must be in the future.
trips.validationArrival: Arrival estimate must be after departure time.
trips.validationResourceConflict: Vehicle or driver already has another schedule at this departure time.
trips.validationSubscriptionLimit: Subscription limit reached. Open schedules cannot be created.

routeEta.title: Route change & ETA update
routeEta.subtitle: Route change requests from dispatch — approve to update customers.
routeEta.searchPlaceholder: Search by trip code, route, location...

routes.title: Routes & stops
routes.subtitle: Configure routes, pickup/drop-off points and route changes.
routes.configSubtitle: Define route, stops and estimated times.
routes.scheduleSubtitle: Create a recurring schedule for this route
routes.scheduleSummaryText: Schedule runs from the selected start date, departing at 06:00 on the selected days each week.
routes.manageSubtitle: Create and maintain stations, routes, stop order and return routes under operator scope.
routes.staffReadOnlyHint: Operator staff can view routes, stations and stops. Admin actions are disabled for this role.
routes.loadFailed: Failed to load routes and stops.
routes.stationSearchRequired: Enter station name or city to search.
routes.platformStationNotFound: No matching platform station was found. You can create a new station and attach it to this operator.
routes.stationPlaceRequired: Select a station place on the map first.
routes.stationLocationRequired: Could not detect city/province from the address. Select a clearer place.
routes.stationAttached: Station has been attached to this operator.
routes.stationCreatedAndAttached: New station has been created and attached to this operator.
routes.stopRequired: Stop name and address are required.
routes.routeStationsRequired: Origin and destination stations are required.
routes.routeStationIdsInvalid: Origin and destination must be valid station IDs. Select stations from the station list.
routes.originDestinationDifferent: Origin and destination must be different.
routes.routeStopRequired: Select a route and stop first.
routes.duplicateStopOrder: Stop order must be unique for this route.
routes.routeStopAdded: Stop has been added to the route order.
routes.routeStopDraftAdded: Stop has been added to the draft route. These stops will be attached automatically when the route is created.
routes.estimateRequiresOriginAndStop: Select an origin station and stop before estimating.
routes.estimateRequiresCoordinates: Origin station and stop need valid coordinates to estimate.
routes.estimatedRouteStopMetrics: Estimated duration and distance from origin.
routes.routeStopRemoved: Stop has been removed from the route.
routes.stationManagementHint: Search platform stations to attach them, or select a map place and create a new station.
routes.stopManagementHint: Create pickup/drop-off stops with address, coordinates and optional place ID.
routes.routeManagementHint: Create active, return or draft routes by station IDs.
routes.stopOrderManagementHint: Attach stops to the selected route and keep order values unique.
routes.ruleOperatorScope: Operator can only manage data within its own scope.
routes.ruleUniqueOrder: Stop order must be unique per route.
routes.ruleDifferentStations: Origin and destination should be different.
routes.mapNoPoints: Select stations with coordinates or add stops to preview the route on the map.

vehicles.title: Vehicle management
vehicles.subtitle: Fleet, maintenance schedules and inspections.
vehicles.confirmDeleteVehicle: Remove this vehicle from the system?
vehicles.registerSubtitle: Add a new vehicle to your operator fleet.
vehicles.apiSubtitle: Manage fleet records, capacity configuration and seat layouts.
vehicles.missingVehicleForDetail: Could not find the vehicle ID to view details. Please reload the vehicle list.
vehicles.missingVehicleForUpdate: Could not find the vehicle ID to update. Please reload the vehicle list.
vehicles.autoSeatCountHint: Calculated automatically from the seat layout below.
vehicles.seatLayoutApiHint: The seat layout is generated automatically from deck, row and column settings.
vehicles.disabledSeatHint: Disabled seats are shown with lower opacity.
vehicles.noSeatMap: This vehicle does not have a seat map yet.
vehicles.maintenanceWarning: The vehicle will be marked as "Maintenance" in the system and cannot be used for trips during this period.

staff.title: Staff management
staff.subtitle: Drivers, dispatchers and ticket sellers for your operator.
staff.confirmDeleteStaff: Remove this staff member from the system?
staff.addSubtitle: Register a driver, dispatcher or ticket seller.
staff.createInitialPasswordSuccess: Staff profile created. The system will send an email so the staff member can set their initial password.
staff.missingUserForResend: Could not find the staff ID to resend the password setup link.
staff.missingUserForDetail: Could not find the staff ID to view details.
staff.initialPasswordFlowBefore: Managers only create the staff profile. The system sends an email so staff can set their own password at
staff.initialPasswordFlowAfter: , then staff sign in with their email and new password.
staff.addInitialPasswordSubtitle: Enter email, display name and role. The system will send the first password setup link to this staff member.
staff.phoneInputHint: Enter a local phone number such as 0901234567.
staff.initialPasswordDetailHint: If the staff member has not received the email or the link expired, return to the list and click the mail icon to resend the password setup link.

bookings.title: Booking monitor
bookings.subtitle: Monitor customer tickets booked via app, web and refund status within the operator scope.
bookings.searchPlaceholder: Search by ticket code, customer, phone...
bookings.counterSubtitle: Quickly create tickets for customers at the station / ticket office.
bookings.monitorNotice: This page does not create, edit or cancel tickets directly. When a customer cancels a refundable ticket, the refund status is shown so the operator admin can identify orders that need review or coordination.

parcels.title: Parcel management
parcels.subtitle: Track consignment orders, per-trip cargo capacity and delivery status.
parcels.searchPlaceholder: Search by order code, sender, recipient...
parcels.createSubtitle: Declare shipment and assign to a transport trip.
parcels.photoReminder: Note: Take proof-of-delivery photos before confirming
parcels.reviewSubtitle: Approve or reject parcel requests that require manual pricing before the customer can proceed to payment.
parcels.decisionReasonPlaceholder: Reason for approval/rejection, capacity note or pricing note...
parcels.reviewPaymentRule: Extra-large parcels cannot proceed to payment until an operator approves the request and sets a manual fee.
parcels.reviewApproveSuccess: Extra-large parcel request approved with manual fee.
parcels.reviewInvalidFee: Manual fee is required and must be greater than 0 when approving.
parcels.reviewAlreadyProcessed: This request has already been processed.
parcels.reviewInsufficientCapacity: Insufficient cargo capacity for this trip.
parcels.deliveryNotPending: This parcel is not pending delivery confirmation.
parcels.reportSummaryHint: Operator parcel totals from the selected date range.
parcels.routeFaresHint: Current parcel price table configured for operator routes.
parcels.lookupHint: Look up a parcel by ID before running operator actions.
parcels.operatorActionsHint: Operator admins can approve, reject, confirm delivery or cancel the selected parcel.
parcels.staffReadOnlyHint: Operator staff can view parcel data. Admin actions are disabled for this role.

gps.title: GPS tracking
gps.subtitle: Real-time map tracking of fleet position, speed and operating status.
gps.selectVehicle: Select a vehicle to center the map
gps.incidentSubmitted: Incident report sent to support team
gps.incidentDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the incident, location, time of occurrence...
gps.incidentNotice: The report will be sent to technical support and operations management for timely handling.

dispatch.confirmCancelRequest: Are you sure you want to cancel this request?

vouchers.operatorModalSubtitle: Configure discount codes for operator bookings.

vouchers.emptyHint: Start by creating a voucher to promote to customers
vouchers.name: Name
vouchers.noRoutesAvailable: No routes available. Create routes first, then select them here.
vouchers.allRoutesHint: No route selected. The voucher will be sent without route restrictions.
vouchers.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Enter a reason so the system can save the response.
vouchers.confirmDeleteOperatorVoucher: Are you sure you want to delete this voucher?
vouchers.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this voucher?
vouchers.createSubtitle: Create a new discount code for customers
vouchers.activateHint: The voucher will be active and customers can use it immediately.

policies.title: Policy management
policies.subtitle: Create and manage policies for your customers.
policies.info: These policies apply to customers booking with your operator, including passenger rules, cancellation and baggage policies.
policies.empty: You haven't created any policies yet
policies.emptyHint: Start by creating a policy for your customers
policies.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this policy?
policies.shortDescPlaceholder: e.g. Rules when boarding and during the trip
policies.contentHint: Use line breaks to separate points (1. Point 1, 2. Point 2)

reports.title: Revenue & analytics
reports.subtitle: Revenue reports, route performance and source breakdown.
reports.subtitleDetail: Detailed financial reports, route performance and revenue breakdown.
reports.revenueChartSubtitle: 12 months of recurring revenue and trip counts

wallet.title: Operator wallet
wallet.subtitle: Manage balance, top-ups and transaction history.
wallet.subtitleShort: Top up, track expenses and transaction history
wallet.topupNote: After confirming, you will be redirected to VNPay. Transactions are processed within 1–2 minutes.

vehicleBuilder.title: Bus Vehicle Layout Builder
vehicleBuilder.subtitle: Manage and customize vehicle seat layouts
vehicleBuilder.emptyHint: Create a vehicle to get started
vehicleBuilder.guideDrag: Drag seats on the canvas to move them
vehicleBuilder.guideClick: Click a seat to select it
vehicleBuilder.guidePanel: Use the right panel to edit details
vehicleBuilder.selectSeatHint: Select a seat to view details
vehicleBuilder.createRequired: Please enter vehicle name and plate number

capacity.title: Manage cargo capacity and seat availability
capacity.subtitle: Configure per-trip cargo limits and manually disable or enable seats under the operator scope.
capacity.hardcodedNotice: Prototype UI with hardcoded data. API can be connected later.
capacity.ruleSeatExists: Selected seat must exist on the trip.
capacity.ruleNoManualSale: Manual disable only removes the seat from the available pool; it is not a booking sale.
capacity.capacityConfigHint: Update maximum cargo weight and volume for the selected trip.
capacity.seatAvailabilityHint: Select a seat, then disable or enable it when operations require manual control.
capacity.disableReasonPlaceholder: Enter maintenance, safety, or operational reason...
capacity.invalidCapacity: Capacity must be a positive number.
capacity.capacityBelowBooked: Capacity cannot be lower than cargo already assigned to this trip.
capacity.seatBooked: Booked seats cannot be manually disabled.
capacity.reasonRequired: Please enter a reason before disabling this seat.
capacity.seatNotDisabled: Only disabled seats can be enabled.

settings.title: Operator settings
settings.subtitle: Configure holiday pricing, booking and parcel policies — applies to all trips and tickets.
settings.pricingInfo: Settings here apply to all tickets and trips. During holidays or special events, the system automatically adds a surcharge based on your configured periods.
settings.autoApplyHint: When enabled, ticket prices increase by the configured % during holiday periods.
settings.defaultSurchargeHint: Applied when no specific period matches.
settings.periodEmpty: No periods yet. Add holidays or events to auto-apply surcharges.
settings.bookingScope: Applies to all trips and bookings through your operator.
settings.cancelHoursHint: How many hours before departure customers can cancel.
settings.holdMinutesHint: Time to hold a seat before auto-cancel.
settings.parcelScope: Applies to all parcel orders on your trips.
settings.feeSummary: Current parcel fee: {{fee}} / parcel · Insurance required when value ≥ {{threshold}}
settings.saveSuccess: Settings saved! Applied to all tickets and trips.
settings.surchargeHint: Applies to all tickets and trips within this period.
settings.confirmDeletePeriod: Are you sure you want to delete this period?
settings.periodNamePlaceholder: e.g. Lunar New Year, Apr 30 – May 1
